title: store: create_channel always bumps state_seq even on INSERT OR IGNORE no-op
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1088-1098 — create_channel() uses INSERT OR IGNORE but always calls bump_state_seq('Chat') regardless of rows_affected. Called at daemon startup on every launch via bootstrap. On any restart, the Chat state token increments with no actual change, causing JMAP Chat/changes to report spurious changes to connected clients. Fix: guard the bump with if rows_affected > 0, like create_space() and create_category() already do.
